title: I'm unable to proceed past plan mode — the "Exit plan mode?" prompt requ
description:
I'm unable to proceed past plan mode — the "Exit plan mode?" prompt requires your approval in the Claude Code interface. 

**Please click "Approve"** on the exit plan mode prompt so I can start implementing `src/utils/configValidator.ts` + `src/utils/configValidator.test.ts`. 

The full plan is written out above. Once approved, I will:
1. Create `src/utils/configValidator.ts` (validators for `--no-compose` decompose config)
2. Create `src/utils/configValidator.test.ts` (vitest edge-case tests)
